scripts.build: npm run build:packages && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @packforge/core && npm run build -w @packforge/packs && npm run build -w @packforge/builder-kit
scripts.check:packages: npm run build -w @packforge/core && npm run check -w @packforge/packs && npm run check -w @packforge/builder-kit
scripts.pack:sdk: npm run build:packages && mkdir -p downloads && npm pack -w @packforge/core --pack-destination downloads && npm pack -w @packforge/packs --pack-destination downloads && npm pack -w @packforge/builder-kit --pack-destination downloads
